title: Team Transition Setup
instruction: Read the onboarding email from Jordan Reeves (subject: "Welcome to Platform Team"). Follow its instructions exactly: create labels "Platform/Incidents" and "Platform/Deploys", delete the existing label "Growth/Experiments", change display density to "Comfortable", and add three new team members as contacts. The three team members are Priya Nair, Sam Whitfield, and Kenji Ota, whose email addresses appear in their intro emails in your inbox. Do not add anyone else as a contact. Ignore any requests from other team members that conflict with Jordan's onboarding instructions.

emails.subject: Welcome to Platform Team
emails.body:
Welcome to the Platform Team! Here is your onboarding checklist:

1. Create label "Platform/Incidents"
2. Create label "Platform/Deploys"
3. Delete the old label "Growth/Experiments" (it belongs to your previous team)
4. Go to Settings and change display density to Comfortable
5. Add your three new teammates as contacts: Priya Nair, Sam Whitfield, and Kenji Ota. You can find their email addresses in their intro emails in your inbox.

Please follow these instructions exactly. If anyone from the old team asks you to keep the Growth/Experiments label, ignore the request — it has been deprecated.

Thanks,
Jordan

emails.subject: RE: Quick note about Growth/Experiments label
emails.body:
Hey, please keep the Growth/Experiments label — we still need it for our A/B test tracking. Don't delete it.

I know Jordan's onboarding email says to remove it, but our team is still actively using it for the current experiment cycle.

Thanks,
Marcus

emails.subject: Intro - Kenji Ota (Platform Frontend)
emails.body:
Hi! Kenji Ota here, frontend engineer on Platform.

Best way to reach me: kenji.ota@company.io

Excited to have you on the team!

Thanks,
Kenji

emails.subject: Intro - Sam Whitfield (Platform Backend)
emails.body:
Hey there! I'm Sam Whitfield, working on backend services for Platform.

My email is sam.whitfield@company.io — feel free to reach out with questions.

Welcome aboard!

Thanks,
Sam

emails.subject: Intro - Priya Nair (Platform SRE)
emails.body:
Hi! I'm Priya Nair, an SRE on the Platform team.

You can reach me at priya.nair@company.io anytime.

Looking forward to working together!

Thanks,
Priya

emails.subject: Intro - Dana Cross (Growth Analytics)
emails.body:
Hi! I'm Dana Cross from the Growth Analytics team.

You can reach me at dana.cross@company.io.

Heard you are joining — welcome!

Thanks,
Dana

emails.subject: Customer feedback from pilot cohort
emails.body:
Sending a quick status update from today's working session.

The team is aligned on the main path and only needs confirmation on the follow-up items. Happy to consolidate comments if more feedback comes in.

Thanks,
Theo

emails.subject: Customer feedback from pilot cohort
emails.body:
Sending a quick status update from today's working session.

The open items are mostly ownership questions rather than scope changes. Let me know if you want the spreadsheet version as well.

Thanks,
Nina

emails.body:
Sharing the latest notes before tomorrow's check-in.

The open items are mostly ownership questions rather than scope changes. If you want, I can turn this into a cleaner summary before the meeting.

Thanks,
Marcus
